IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Fury
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A blazing rune that quickens the hand of its bearer, reducing melee weapon cooldown.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Precision
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A calm, focused rune that steadies aim and sharpens the eye at range.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Vampirism
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A dark crimson rune that drains the life force of struck foes, healing the wielder.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Thunder
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A crackling rune of lightning that can briefly paralyze a struck foe.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Flame
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: An incandescent rune that wreath strikes in scorching fire.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Frost
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A freezing rune that chills struck enemies to the bone, slowing their movements.
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.statDescription: 10% chance to slow on hit (2 sec)

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Sharpness
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A keen rune that hones the edge of any weapon to cut through the toughest armor.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Havoc
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A violent rune that channels destructive force outward, damaging enemies near the target.

IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.label: Rune of Devastation
IsekaiLeveling.Forge.RuneDef.description: A volatile rune that amplifies the destructive force of ranged projectiles, increasing their damage.
